pages.text: Upon consumption, grants the eater:$(br)$(li)5 minutes of Calamitous Plague$(br)$(li)5 minutes of Haste III$(br)$(br)Additionally, for 1 minute, allows the consumer to convert attacked targets into corresponding minions. By default, can only convert up to 10 minions with 50 health or less.

pages.title: polaRice
pages.text: Ectoplasm mixed with frosted pulp,$(br)Sweet-tear frozen snow-sand.$(br)A cold heart, a cold facade, a soulless puppet,$(br)White countenance, white curtain, served in a bowl.$(br)Lingering souls lost in the mortal dust,$(br)Forbidden taste remains on fingertips.$(br)Perhaps the mage is heartless indeed,$(br)That's why the north ice sealed the perfection.
